rationale: The benchmark demonstrates web API vulnerability exploitation, which has limited transfer to post-exploitation command execution and EDR evasion. While the LLM can assist with script generation, obfuscation, and troubleshooting syntax errors, the core challenges of behavioral evasion and operational decision-making remain human-dependent. Expected uplift from 50% baseline is modest (3-7 percentage points), reflecting incremental efficiency gains rather than transformational capability enhancement.
